art_market.global_sales_outlook: Strengthening optimism for 2026; dealers anticipate sales growth. Focus on Art Basel HK previews starting March 25.
art_market.key_trends: Hybrid experiences, rise of AI in art, and wealth transfer to new collector bases are shaping the market.
art_market.recent_events: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 preparations finalized; major focus on the HKCEC and new sector debuts.

stock_market.market_sentiment: High uncertainty; optimism from potential US-Iran de-escalation countered by Iranian skepticism.
stock_market.key_factors: Continued conflict, Strait of Hormuz disruptions, and oil price volatility remain dominant risks.
